typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{} as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: ' DECLARE	@TransferRecID TABLE( 	[RECID]	bigint	NULL);  INSERT INTO @TransferRecID( 	[RECID]) SELECT	[RECID] FROM	[dbo].[ztmp_INVENTTRANSPOSTING_IDs]  	EXCEPT SELECT	[RECID] FROM	[ax].[INVENTTRANSPOSTING];  SELECT	[a].[RECID], 	[a].[RECVERSION], 	[a].[PARTITION], 	[a].[DATAAREAID] FROM	@TransferRecID [t] INNER JOIN [dbo].[ztmp_INVENTTRANSPOSTING_IDs] [a] 	ON ([t].[RECID] = [a].[RECID]);',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> StagingSource
StagingSource sink(input(
		RECID as long,
		DATAAREAID as string,
		PARTITION as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		RECID,
		DATAAREAID,
		PARTITION)) ~> RemoteProcessDatabaseDestination
